arts.ttl: Pierre-Emerick Aubameyang reveals why he will 'never say sorry' to Mikel Arteta over Arsenal fallout
arts.sum: The former Gunners captain departed in 2022 on less than pleasant terms

arts.ttl: Report: Arsenal prepared to come to the table for PSG star if the terms are right
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly considering a move for Paris Saint-Germain forward Lee Kang-in. The Athletic reports that the 23-year-old is considering his options despite playing regularly under head coach Luis Enrique. It’s thought that PSG are not actively looking to sell and the club rate Lee highly. arts.ttl: Pierre-Emerick Aubameyang opens up on leaving Arsenal after Mikel Arteta was 'killing me' - as he reveals the incident that changed their relationship
arts.sum: Pierre-Emerick Aubameyang has spoken out about his bitter exit from Arsenal after falling out with Mikel Arteta.

arts.ttl: 'Mikel Arteta brought me to tears – I had to stand up in front of everyone and say sorry'
arts.sum: One former Arsenal star has detailed how the breakdown of his relationship with manager Mikel Arteta led to an emotional apology in front of the squad prior to his transfer exit

arts.ttl: Gary Neville sets Arsenal record straight with same criticism of two struggling stars
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta's Arsenal could have closed the gap on Premier League leaders Liverpool to four points with a win over Brighton on Saturday, but were held to a 1-1 draw instead

arts.ttl: Martin Dubravka Newcastle United exit moves step closer after Saudi director move
arts.sum: Newcastle United goalkeeper Martin Dubravka's move to the Saudi Arabian Pro League could be about to take a big step forward with a key appointment imminent at Al-Shabab. United have stayed tight-lipped on his future, but with the 35-year-old out of contract in the summer, and Nick Pope expected to reclaim his first-team place once he recovers from his knee injury, they are unlikely to stand in Dubravka's way.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Arsenal growing excited as £48.1m winger Mikel Arteta loves now open to Premier League move
Newcastle United will ‘try to make move in next few days’ to secure January signing for Eddie Howe
arts.sum: Newcastle United have included Paris Saint-Germain’s Kang-in Lee in their target list for the winter market. That’s according to TuttoMercatoWeb, who state Newcastle have made an approach for the 23-year-old. Operating mainly on the right wing and at times in other attacking positions, he managed six goals and two assists from 24 games this season. The post Newcastle United will ‘try to make move in next few days’ to secure January signing for Eddie Howe appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United hear Sky Sports 'off air' Alexander Isak remarks as club chief reacts
arts.sum: Newcastle United boss Eddie Howe says that lifting the Carabao Cup would ram the words of the club's transfer agitators back down their throats. On the eve of Howe's Press conference, former Republic of Ireland and Crystal Palace star Clinton Morrison was the latest pundit to talk up a bid for Isak from tonight's opponents Arsenal.
